hypothesis: Exact public-schema array variants plus transitive wrapper reachability can place Modal action content legally, while complete-slot closure prevents optional-tail garbage and schema-derived role checking avoids false Modal.title failures.

diagnostic_r1.disposition: superseded after the evaluator incorrectly rejected established form slots in Input.placeholder

per_record_treatment.ood_gallery_01:
root = Stack([v0], "column")
v0 = ImageGallery([{src: ":ood.gallery.img", alt: ":ood.gallery.alt", details: ":ood.gallery.caption"}])
per_record_treatment.ood_modal_01:
root = Stack([v0, v1], "column")
v0 = Modal(":ood.modal.title", false, [TextContent(":ood.modal.body"), Buttons([Button(":ood.modal.confirm")])])
v1 = Button(":ood.modal.confirm")
per_record_treatment.ood_auth_01:
root = Stack([v0, v1, v2], "column")
v0 = Button(":ood.auth.create")
v1 = Input("", ":ood.auth.name")
v2 = Input("", ":ood.auth.email")

decision: Retain v74 as default-off positive mixed evidence. Modal and Auth pass strict v2, raising the suite from 1/4 to 2/4 and reward from 0.8515 to 0.8575, but duplicate action emission lowers structure and AST edge F1; AgentV and the partial suite still fail ship readiness.
